content.full_text:
July 1, 1991

FPPC
428 J Street, Suite 610
Sacramento, California 95814

Attn: Sandra Taylor

Dear Sandra:

This is a request to receive in writing from you the statement provided to me over the phone last week, that "the act does not prohibit a general purpose, local committee from contributing to both ballot measures and to candidates"...and I am paraphrasing somewhat.

I will appreciate your prompt response to my request on behalf of the Board of Trustees of AROPAC.

Thank you.

Sincerely,

[signature]
Shirley Huston
